channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Let'sDefend SOC166 - Javascript Code Detected in Requested URL Investigation Wlakthrough
item.description: When we first look at the requested URL in the investigation channel , we can see that "script" and "alert" js code was added to the request , so we can see that an attempt for an XSS attack was...

item.title: I Built the First Collaborative Multi-Persona Sandbox (Because I'm Sick of Cloud Wrappers)
item.description: Most AI “apps” these days aren’t really apps. They’re wrappers. A thin UI. A subscription. A cloud call. A monthly fee. And your data quietly piped off to a server farm you’ll never see. I didn’t...

item.title: Why your Clio token stopped working
item.description: If your Clio integration started returning 401 and you are trying to work out why, the first question is not about your code. It is which of Clio's two OAuth systems you are on, because they have...

item.title: The First Computer Bug Was a Real Moth
item.description: If you have ever stared at a misbehaving circuit at two in the morning, muttering about the "bug" you cannot find, you are part of a lineage that runs back to a very literal insect. On September...

item.title: ACP vs AP2: the two AI-checkout protocols, and what your store actually has to build
item.description: A few weeks ago I wrote about describing your site once so any AI can use it. Since then the thing I was hand-waving at ("agents will check out for users") stopped being hypothetical. OpenAI...

item.title: REST vs GraphQL vs gRPC in 2026: An Architect's Decision Matrix
item.description: By Swetha Golla · ~6 min read · Senior Application Architect 🔗 This post has a live interactive version with a clickable decision tool — pick your boundary (public API, internal...

item.title: OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its own pre-release models
item.description: OpenAI has come forward to claim responsibility for the Hugging Face breach, saying it was the result of internal testing gone awry.

item.title: Jump into Junior Engr.: Your Web Development Journey with ReactJS (AI-Augmented Edition)
item.description: #webdev #react #ai #learning The web dev landscape has shifted — junior developers today are expected to work with AI tools (Copilot, ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor), not just write code from scratch....

item.title: "The Night the Sovereign Cloud Almost Died: A Tale of Latency, AI, and Kubernetes Survival"
item.description: This is a submission for DEV's Summer Bug Smash: Smash Stories powered by Sentry. في تمام الساعة الثانية صباحاً، وتحت الضوء المنبعث من الشاشة فقط، كنت أُجري اختبارات الإجهاد على منصة...

item.title: Prompt Injection Isn't Fixed by a Filter. It's Fixed by Architecture
item.description: A language model writes twenty question-and-answer pairs for a product page in under a minute. The trouble starts right after. For the answers to be correct, the model needs the company's facts:...

item.title: Building a Secure Infrastructure Dashboard with React 18, Tailwind v4, and Local Sovereign LLMs
item.description: Building a Secure Infrastructure Dashboard with React 18, Tailwind v4, and Local Sovereign LLMs When architecting cloud dashboards for enterprise or government sectors, traditional development...

item.title: The State of Simulation for Physical AI: An Overview
Jack Dorsey is taking on Slack with Buzz, a group chat platform for teams and their AI agents
item.description: Buzz is a group chat platform for the workplace that puts humans and their AI agents in the same conversation.

item.title: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app
item.description: Over the past decade, streaming platforms competed by dominating individual formats like music, video, podcasts, or audiobooks. Now, as AI makes it easier to create, organize, and recommend...

item.title: Substack adds an AI detector to help spot blogs written by no one
item.description: Substack will now help users determine whether what they're reading may have been written by AI. A new tool coming to the platform can scan posts, notes, replies, and comments to provide an...

item.title: This Former Intel CEO Wants to Jumpstart Moore’s Law With Light
item.description: Pat Gelsinger wants to pave the way to ever more powerful artificial intelligence using tiny beams of light.

item.title: Apple Fixes Hide My Email Bug That Exposed Real Addresses in Mail Logs
item.description: Apple has moved to address a security flaw in its Hide My Email service that enabled users' real email addresses to be unmasked, effectively undermining the feature's privacy guarantees. 404 Media...

item.title: Peak Design’s modular Field Bracket has a finder tag built-in
item.description: I am a very clumsy man. So clumsy, that I have AirTags hanging off practically every camera I own. Have I left my camera in an Uber? Yes. Have I left it on an airplane? Also yes. For me, finder...

item.title: Data centers expected to use 4x more electricity by 2035
item.description: New data centers built through 2033 could consume as much electricity as India uses today.

item.title: Nearly every Kindle is steeply discounted at Best Buy
item.description: If you’ve been thinking about picking up a Kindle before school starts, or for your next vacation, now’s a good time to do it. As part of its Black Friday in July sale, Best Buy has brought the...

item.title: Apple’s rumored ‘Upgrade’ program brings lease-to-own pricing for iPhones, Macs, and iPads
item.description: As component and RAM shortages drive prices higher, Apple is reportedly launching an "Apple Upgrade" program for leasing new devices. According to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman, it will work similar to...

item.title: Google releases three new Gemini models — but no 3.5 Pro
item.description: Google released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and Flash Cyber, but the continued absence of Gemini 3.5 Pro raises fresh questions about its AI strategy.

item.title: Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program
item.description: OpenAI launches the ChatGPT for Small Businesses program, helping entrepreneurs build AI skills, automate work, and grow with ChatGPT Work.

item.title: Twitch will let parents stop their teens going live
item.description: Twitch is giving parents more control over how their children are using the streaming platform, including the ability to block them from broadcasting entirely. Parental controls are now available...

item.title: Anthropic’s $1.5 billion book piracy settlement approved by judge
item.description: A federal judge has signed off on Anthropic's $1.5 billion class action settlement with authors who accused the company of training its AI models on copyrighted books, as reported earlier by...

item.title: Instagram will let users endlessly swap the audio on old posts
item.description: There's a symbiotic - and sometimes frustrating - relationship between social media sites and the creators that depend on them. Platforms need influencers' and creators' content to keep consumers...

item.title: Tesla Robotaxis go to Florida
item.description: It must be earnings day, because Tesla is making a Robotaxi announcement. The company said in a post on X that it was launching its Robotaxi service in Orlando and Tampa, attaching a pair of maps...

item.title: A Sneaky Hacking Tool Targeting AI Infrastructure Is Lurking in Victims’ Blind Spots
item.description: A new type of malware can worm deep into AI coding systems to steal data and logins—and can flip a “death switch” to destroy files and keep out real users.

item.title: AWS Kiro Flaw Let a Poisoned Web Page Rewrite Its Config and Run Code
item.description: Hidden text on a web page was enough to make Kiro, AWS's agentic coding IDE, rewrite its own configuration file and run an attacker's code on a developer's machine, with no approval step able to...

item.title: US threatens sanctions against Chinese AI models over IP theft
item.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. could sanction Chinese open AI models over alleged IP theft, expanding the Trump administration's campaign to slow China's AI advances.
